thought.text: 现在更新 jumpStatement 支持 break 和 continue：

action.new_str:
jumpStatement
    :   Return expression? Semi
    |   Break Semi
    |   Continue Semi
    ;

tool_call.name: file_editor
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "old_str": "jumpStatement
    :   (Return expression?)
    Semi
    ;", "new_str": "jumpStatement
    :   Return expression? Semi
    |   Break Semi
    |   Continue Semi
    ;"}
